DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Continued To Feb-02-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PAT KANE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2007, TO BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS THE MOTION TO DISQUALIFY COUNSEL. EACH PARTY MAY FILE AND SERVE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 29, 2007, ADDRESSING: A) WHETHER, AUTOMATIC BANKRUPTCY STAY APPLIES TO THIS CASE; B) WHETHER, IF IT DOES APPLY, IT WOULD PREVENT COURT FROM CONSIDERING EVEN THE MOTION TO DISQUALIFY; C) WHETHER, IF IT DOES NOT APPLY, THE COURT HAS DISCRETION TO STAY CONSIDERATION OF ISSUES ADDRESSING THE CASE MERITS DURING THE PENDENCY OF THE BANKRUPTCY. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
